inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 diluted EPS per `tbbk-investor-presentation-q4-2025.pdf` slide 7; corroborated by H1 2025 diluted EPS $2.46 in `TBBK-Q2-2025-10Q.pdf`
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash proxied by diluted EPS. Fintech credit sponsorship provisions ($43.2M Q2 2025) offset in non-interest income with no net income impact per 10-Q footnote.

bear.notes: Fintech credit losses exceed fees; NIM compression; buybacks slow above $10B asset cap

base.notes: Mid-single-digit organic growth below Apex 2030; ~100% capital return continues; 13x exit on year-10 owner earnings

bull.notes: Embedded finance + credit sponsorship scale; partial Apex 2030 delivery; sustained 25%+ ROE

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Bank marks loans and securities at fair value; shareholders equity $860M at 6/30/2025 per 10-Q

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Operating bank; no land or royalty reserves

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Consumer fintech credit charge-offs $151.1M in 2025 per investor presentation; matched fee/provision accounting in 10-Q

option_scan.question: Backlog / pipeline not in base cash path?
option_scan.evidence: Embedded finance launch and Apex 2030 in bull scenario only; not in Lawrence base growth

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Fintech fee income ($141M YTD 2025 fintech deposits segment per Q4 2025 presentation) already in owner earnings

growth_explanation.mechanism: Fintech partner deposit growth funds low-cost balance sheet; fee income from prepaid/debit sponsorship and credit programs compounds with share count reduction via buybacks
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Fintech net charge-offs exceed fee income growth for two consecutive years
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Q4 2026 run-rate EPS reaches $7.00 on sustained ROE above 25%
